This [[Gender/Legends|female]] was the '''mother''' of [[Chuck Bratz|Chuck]] and [[Donni Bratz]]. She was always trying to break up arguments between the two. She told Chuck to not call Donni a "meatface", yet she reminded Donni that Chuck was the best older brother one could ask for.

==Appearances==
*''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' {{Ab|Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
